title: quercus robur var. brachycarpa
intro: Quercus robur var. brachycarpa, also known as the English oak dwarf, is a variant of the English oak tree (Quercus robur) characterized by its smaller acorns. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Quercus robur var. brachycarpa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Quercus robur var. brachycarpa is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and is used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
